message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
rectangle "Application" as Application
rectangle "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as AutoSDKEngine
rectangle "«avs»\nAlexa" as Alexa

alt ["Activating Trial"]
  note right of User
    clicks `Activate Trial` button\non screen to activate\ntrial up-sell.
  end note
  User -> Application: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_TRIAL event
  Application -> AutoSDKEngine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_TRIAL event
  activate AutoSDKEngine
  alt ["Activating Paid Plan"]
    note right of User
      clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button\non screen to activate\npaid plan up-sell.
    end note
    User -> Application: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN event
    Application -> AutoSDKEngine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN event
    activate AutoSDKEngine
  end
  AutoSDKEngine -> Alexa: InitiateDataPlanSubscription event
  alt ["Successful in sending event to Alexa"]
    Alexa -> Application: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with SUCCESS status
  else ["on failure"]
    Alexa -> Application: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with FAIL status
  end
  deactivate AutoSDKEngine
end

@enduml
